title: LesRaisins Armor
description: A decorative armor mod, includes some tactical style armor.
body:
# LesRaisins Armor  
LesRaisins Armor MOD is a decorative armor mod designed by LesRaisins team for integration packs and PVP.  

## Dependency
**!!! Geckolib is required !!!**

## Contents and Features 
 
### ARMORS   
- Attacker Set  
- Defender Set  
- Scout Set  
- Medic Set  
- Sniper suit  
- Chemical Defense Suit  
- Armored Chemical Resistant Suit  
- more..

### FEATURES  
Each suit of armor can gain a special buff gain after wearing 4 pieces of armor from the same suit.
